title: helenium polyphyllum
intro: Helenium polyphyllum, also known as Sneezeweed or American False Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate sweating and relieve fever, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helenium polyphyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of Helenium polyphyllum can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory ailments.
